      obtain ⟨a, ha⟩ := h₄

      -- Use the injectivity of the Chinese map to show that the representatives are equal
      have h₆ : chineseMap I (Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) a) = chineseMap I (Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) b) := by
        rw [ha, hb] at *
        exact h₂
      -- Simplify the equation using the definition of the Chinese map
      have h₇ : (fun i : ι => Quotient.mk (I i) a) = (fun i : ι => Quotient.mk (I i) b) := by
        have h₈ : chineseMap I (Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) a) = chineseMap I (Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) b) := h₆
        have h₉ : chineseMap I (Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) a) = (fun i : ι => Quotient.mk (I i) a) := by
          simp [chineseMap_mk]
        have h₁₀ : chineseMap I (Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) b) = (fun i : ι => Quotient.mk (I i) b) := by
          simp [chineseMap_mk]
        rw [h₉] at h₈
        rw [h₁₀] at h₈
        exact h₈
      -- Since the functions are equal, their values at each i are equal
      have h₈ : ∀ (i : ι), Quotient.mk (I i) a = Quotient.mk (I i) b := by
        intro i
        have h₉ := congr_fun h₇ i
        exact h₉
      -- This implies that a - b is in each ideal I i
      have h₉ : ∀ (i : ι), a - b ∈ I i := by
        intro i
        have h₁₀ : Quotient.mk (I i) a = Quotient.mk (I i) b := h₈ i
        have h₁₁ : Quotient.mk (I i) (a - b) = 0 := by
          calc
            Quotient.mk (I i) (a - b) = Quotient.mk (I i) a - Quotient.mk (I i) b := by
              simp [Quotient.mk_sub]
            _ = 0 := by rw [h₁₀]; simp
        have h₁₂ : a - b ∈ I i := by
          simpa [Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem] using h₁₁
        exact h₁₂
      -- Therefore, a - b is in the intersection of all I i
      have h₁₀ : a - b ∈ ⨅ i, I i := by
        -- Use the fact that the intersection is the set of elements in every I i
        exact Ideal.mem_iInf.mpr h₉
      -- This implies that the quotients of a and b are equal in R ⧸ ⨅ i, I i
      have h₁₁ : (Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) a : R ⧸ ⨅ i, I i) = (Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) b : R ⧸ ⨅ i, I i) := by
        have h₁₂ : a - b ∈ ⨅ i, I i := h₁₀
        have h₁₃ : (Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) (a - b) : R ⧸ ⨅ i, I i) = 0 := by
          simp [Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem, h₁₂]
        have h₁₄ : (Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) a : R ⧸ ⨅ i, I i) - (Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) b : R ⧸ ⨅ i, I i) = 0 := by
          calc
            (Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) a : R ⧸ ⨅ i, I i) - (Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) b : R ⧸ ⨅ i, I i) =
                (Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) (a - b) : R ⧸ ⨅ i, I i) := by
              simp [Quotient.mk_sub]
            _ = 0 := h₁₃
        have h₁₅ : (Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) a : R ⧸ ⨅ i, I i) = (Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) b : R ⧸ ⨅ i, I i) := by
          rw [sub_eq_zero] at h₁₄
          exact h₁₄
        exact h₁₅
      -- Since the quotients are equal, x = y
      have h₁₂ : x = y := by
        calc
          x = (Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) a : R ⧸ ⨅ i, I i) := by rw [ha]
          _ = (Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) b : R ⧸ ⨅ i, I i) := h₁₁
          _ = y := by rw [hb]
      exact h₁₂
    exact h₃
  exact h₁

  intro x y hxy
  have h₁ : Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) x = Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) y := by
    have h₂ : (chineseMap I : (R ⧸ ⨅ i, I i) →+* Π i, R ⧸ I i) x = (chineseMap I : (R ⧸ ⨅ i, I i) →+* Π i, R ⧸ I i) y := by

    have h₃ : (chineseMap I : (R ⧸ ⨅ i, I i) →+* Π i, R ⧸ I i) x = (chineseMap I : (R ⧸ ⨅ i, I i) →+* Π i, R ⧸ I i) y := h₂

      intro i

      have h₅ : (chineseMap I) (Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) x) = (chineseMap I) (Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) y) := by
        simpa [chineseMap_mk] using h₃

      have h₆ : (chineseMap I) (Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) x) i = (chineseMap I) (Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) y) i := by
        rw [h₅]
      -- Simplify the expression using the definition of Chinese map
      simp [chineseMap_mk, Pi.ringHom_apply] at h₆ ⊢
      <;>
      aesop
    -- Use the fact that the kernel of the Chinese map is the intersection of the ideals to deduce that x ≡ y mod ⨅ i, I i
    have h₅ : ∀ (i : ι), (x - y : R) ∈ I i := by
      intro i
      have h₆ : (Quotient.mk (I i) : R →+* R ⧸ I i) x = (Quotient.mk (I i) : R →+* R ⧸ I i) y := h₄ i
      have h₇ : (x - y : R) ∈ I i := by

          calc
            (Quotient.mk (I i) : R →+* R ⧸ I i) (x - y) = (Quotient.mk (I i) : R →+* R ⧸ I i) x - (Quotient.mk (I i) : R →+* R ⧸ I i) y := by
              apply map_sub
            _ = 0 := by
              rw [h₆]
              simp

        have h₁₀ : (x - y : R) ∈ I i := by
          simp_all [Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
          <;>
          aesop
        exact h₁₀
      exact h₇
    -- Since x - y ∈ I i for all i, it follows that x - y ∈ ⨅ i, I i
    have h₆ : (x - y : R) ∈ ⨅ i, I i := by
      apply Ideal.mem_iInf.mpr
      intro i
      exact h₅ i
    -- Therefore, x ≡ y mod ⨅ i, I i
    have h₇ : Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) x = Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) y := by
      have h₈ : Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) (x - y) = 0 := by
        have h₉ : (x - y : R) ∈ ⨅ i, I i := h₆
        have h₁₀ : Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) (x - y) = 0 := by
          simp_all [Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
          <;>
          aesop
        exact h₁₀
      have h₉ : Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) x - Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) y = 0 := by
        calc
          Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) x - Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) y = Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) (x - y) := by
            apply Quotient.eq_iff_iInf.mpr
            <;>
            simp_all [Ideal.mem_iInf]

      have h₁₀ : Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) x = Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) y := by
        have h₁₁ : Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) x - Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) y = 0 := h₉
        have h₁₂ : Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) x = Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) y := by
          apply eq_of_sub_eq_zero
          exact h₁₁
        exact h₁₂
      exact h₁₀
    exact h₇
  -- Since x ≡ y mod ⨅ i, I i, we have x = y in R ⧸ ⨅ i, I i
  exact Quotient.eq_iff_iInf.mp h₁

        -- This is a placeholder for the actual proof that the Chinese map is injective

        -- Use the fact that the Chinese map is injective to derive a contradiction

        simp_all [chineseMap]

            have h₈ : (x - y : R ⧸ ⨅ i, I i) ≠ 0 := h₄
            simp_all [chineseMap]
            <;> contradiction

        <;>
        (try

            have h₈ : (x - y : R ⧸ ⨅ i, I i) ≠ 0 := h₄
